## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / assets only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] `cmd/assets/` updated if scoring logic or rubric changed
- [ ] `tessl eval run cmd/assets/` passes (tile changes only)
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Conventional commit message used (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
